meta.title: Model Performance Dashboard
meta.subtitle: Predictive models for customer churn and revenue, explained for decision-makers
meta.generated_note: Data extracted from App 2 model reports. Drift view is a simulated monitoring preview.

business.question: Which customers are likely to cancel?
business.metric_plain: How well the model ranks churn risk (0.5 = coin flip, 1.0 = perfect).
business.action: Target at-risk accounts with retention offers before they churn.

business.question: How much revenue will each account generate?
business.metric_plain: Average dollar error of the revenue forecast (lower is better).
business.action: Forecast account revenue to prioritize high-value relationships.
